releases.summary: Analytics added, smoother loading on key pages, and an MCQ question viewer.
changes: Added PostHog analytics so we can understand how the admin app is used.
Candidates page now reuses cached data after the first load to avoid repeat loading.
Interviews page now reuses cached data after the first load for smoother navigation.
Added a “View questions” dialog on MCQ assessments so hiring teams can review questions and reports.
